zqMock classes that imitate idlelib modules or classes.
Attributes and methods will be added as needed for tests.
Textc
FuncaZ
Record call, capture args, return/raise result set by test.
    When mock function is called, set or use attributes:
    self.called - increment call number even if no args, kwds passed.
    self.args - capture positional arguments.
    self.kwds - capture keyword arguments.
    self.result - return or raise value set in __init__.
    self.return_self - return self instead, to mock query class return.
    Most common use will probably be to mock instance methods.
    Given class instance, can set and delete as instance attribute.
    Mock_tk.Var and Mbox_func are special variants of this.
    NFc
called
result
return_self
args
kwds)
selfr
3/usr/lib64/python3.9/idlelib/idle_test/mock_idle.py
__init__
Func.__init__c
isinstancer
BaseExceptionr
__call__
Func.__call__)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__r
Editorz1Minimally imitate editor.EditorWindow class.
    Nc
text
UndoDelegatorZ
undo)
flist
filename
rootr
Editor.__init__c
end)
index)
firstZ
lastr
get_selection_indices0
Editor.get_selection_indices)
NNNNN)
z0Minimally imitate undo.UndoDelegator class.
    c
undo_block_start:
UndoDelegator.undo_block_startc
undo_block_stop<
UndoDelegator.undo_block_stopN)
